How credits work

1
Buy a credit pack

Choose a plan above and pay securely with card (Lemon Squeezy) or any cryptocurrency (Cryptomus).

2
Credits added instantly

Once payment is confirmed, credits appear in your dashboard within seconds.

3
Generate timestamps

Each generation uses 1 credit. Submit a YouTube URL or upload a video file to get AI-generated chapters.

4
Credits never expire

Your credits stay in your account indefinitely. Top up anytime when you need more.

Frequently Asked Questions

What payment methods are accepted?

We accept all major credit/debit cards via Lemon Squeezy, and any cryptocurrency (Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, etc.) via Cryptomus.

How long does it take for credits to appear?

Card payments are instant. Crypto payments are confirmed once your transaction has enough blockchain confirmations, usually within a few minutes.

Do credits expire?

No. Credits never expire and remain in your account until you use them.

What counts as one generation?

Each time you submit a YouTube URL or upload a video file and receive timestamp results, 1 credit is used.

Can I get a refund?

Due to the nature of digital credits, all purchases are final once credits are added to your account. If you have an issue, contact us and we'll do our best to help.

Is there a free trial?

New accounts receive a small number of free credits to try the service before purchasing.
